turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 86-1845, Torres against Oakland Scavenger Company will be announced by Justice Marshall.

turns.name: JUSTICE MARSHALL
turns.text: This case is here on certiorari to the Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit. Here, we hold that failure to file a Notice of Appeal in compliance with the specificity requirement of Federal Rule of Appellate Procedure 3(c) presents a jurisdictional bar to that appeal. The judgment of the Court of Appeals is therefore affirmed. Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in the judgment and Justice Brennan has filed a dissenting opinion.
